titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 2766
GA 2766
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used were version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Changes to text at 18.20 by David Parker.
Changes to text at 18.10, 11, 12 by David Parker.
Supplied tags removed at 18.3 by David Parker.
δι αυτουτο changed to δια υτουτο at 5.16 by Rachel Kevern.
Roman character changed to Greek one at 5.36 by Rachel Kevern.
Roman character changed to Greek one at 5.16 by Rachel Kevern.
[6] changed back to [λεγεις] at 16.29 by Rachel Kevern.
[υμων] changed to [4] at 16.20 and some improvements made to the gap tags and supplied tags at 13.26-29 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 18.21 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Supplied text changed to numbers in gap tags at 13.26-29 by Rachel Kevern.
συνηρχοντ[αι] changed to συνηρχοντο at 18.20 by Rachel Kevern.
[λεγεις] changed to [6] at 16.29 by Rachel Kevern.
Verse break changed at 6.22 by David Parker.
Word break added at 11.25, lacuna tagging changed in 11.28 by David Parker.
Superline on name at 11.19 removed, nomSac tagged at 19.18, supplied letter added at 1.48 by David Parker.
Word break corrected at 5.5 by David Parker.
Word breaks changed at 5.16 by David Parker.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 2766Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 118rBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: acmTranscription begun: 20.11.2012Transcription finished: 17.12.2012 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - No Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No Other remarks: Omits verses 11.34 – 12.2 Omits verses 14.3 – 16.7 Omits 19.42

ab.note: The second eta has a cross written above it.
